data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simple navigation design reduces decision time by offering fewer choices.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Large, clickable button elements improve accessibility and usability.
data.technical_spec: Size and proximity for ease of use

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped together visually.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Key information is positioned at the beginning and end of lists for impact.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: User experience focuses on creating memorable peak moments.
